name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Western Union is a global money transfer service enabling customers to send and receive money internationally and domestically with competitive exchange rates and low fees.
description_long:
Western Union is a well-established financial services company that specializes in money transfer and payment services. The company has built its reputation over decades as a trusted provider for moving funds across borders and within countries, serving millions of customers worldwide.

Western Union's primary offerings include international money transfers with real-time exchange rates, domestic money transfers within the United States, and online transfer services. The platform allows customers to send money to 200+ countries and territories, supporting multiple currencies including USD, MXN, GTQ, PHP, INR, COP, DOP, JMD, AFN, EUR, and many others. The company provides both online and in-person transfer options, with rates starting as low as $0 USD in fees (after promotional offer) and standard fees beginning at $1.99 USD.

What distinguishes Western Union is its extensive global reach with direct corridors to virtually every country and territory, competitive exchange rates that are updated in real-time, and the ability to register for improved rates and fee reductions. The platform supports transfers to major currencies and allows senders to compare rates before committing to a transaction. Their online registration system provides better pricing incentives, including promotional $0 fees on first international transfers.

Western Union remains a primary choice for international remittances and domestic money transfers, though customers should be aware that while fees can be competitive, exchange rates and actual costs vary based on destination country, transfer method, and amount. The service is particularly valuable for those with family abroad or regular international payment needs, but users should compare rates across corridors as they vary significantly by destination.
pros: Serves 200+ countries and territories with extensive global reach
Competitive fees starting at $1.99 USD, with $0 promotional fees on first international transfers
Real-time exchange rates displayed before transaction completion
Online registration provides better exchange rates and fee reduction incentives
Wide variety of supported currencies including major and emerging market currencies
Both online and in-person transfer options available
Transparent rate calculator showing exact amount receiver will get before sending
cons: Exchange rates and fees vary significantly depending on destination country and transfer method
Website mentions temporary service unavailability (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable)
No information provided about delivery timeframes or speed of transfers
Customer service contact information and support options not visible on provided website content
best_for: Individuals sending remittances to family members in other countries
Customers needing to send money to emerging markets with limited banking infrastructure
People seeking competitive exchange rates on international transfers with real-time rate transparency
Those who prefer established, widely-recognized brands for international money movement
diagnosis: Western Union is best for individuals and families needing to send money internationally or domestically with access to one of the world's largest transfer networks. The main caveat is that actual fees and exchange rates vary significantly by destination country and transfer method, so users should always verify rates before sending and compare with alternatives for their specific corridor.
services: Domestic money transfers within the United States
Multi-currency transfers (USD, MXN, GTQ, PHP, INR, COP, DOP, JMD, AFN, EUR, and 190+ others)
Real-time exchange rate quotes and calculators
Promotional $0 fee offerings on first international transfers
Money transfers to 200+ countries and territories
Variable fee structure based on destination and amount
